commands.cmd: browse official NIH ODS, National Academies, FDA/eCFR, and USDA FoodData Central primary sources

summary: Mapped authoritative source/version evidence and safe semantics for DRI/RDA/AI/EAR/UL/AMDR/CDRR, FDA Daily Values, calorie-factor labeling rules, and USDA FoodData Central data types/releases/API/licensing. Recorded life-stage/privacy boundaries, unit/form gaps, disclaimers, and exact unresolved Judge decisions without implementing numbers or making a provider call.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit without a receipt, so the PM completed the same read-only primary-source mapping as permitted fallback.
